description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every push to master and tproxy_mark_param branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8). For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-tests.txt, lint the code with flake8, and run tests with pytest.
